why_choose_us.title: Why Choose Caros?
why_choose_us.description: Premium service, dependable support, and a lineup designed to elevate every journey.
why_choose_us.safe_desc: Every vehicle is inspected and well-maintained for your complete peace of mind.
why_choose_us.service_desc: Round-the-clock assistance whenever you need us.
why_choose_us.quality_desc: Only the finest vehicles, held to top-tier standards throughout.
why_choose_us.selection_desc: From economy to luxury, the right vehicle for every need.
why_choose_us.drivers_desc: An experienced, courteous team guiding you every step of the way.
why_choose_us.awards_desc: Recognized for excellence in customer service and vehicle quality.

sale.description: Premium vehicles, transparent pricing, and support that lasts beyond the sale.

sale.selection_desc: From economy to luxury, find the right car to own.
sale.drivers_desc: Knowledgeable advisors to help you choose and pay in installments with confidence.
sale.awards_desc: Recognized for excellence in service and vehicle quality.

rental.description: Premium service, dependable support, and a fleet designed to elevate every trip.
rental.safe_desc: All our vehicles are regularly maintained and insured for your peace of mind.

rental.quality_desc: Only the finest vehicles with top-tier amenities and support.
rental.selection_desc: From economy to luxury, we have the right vehicle for every occasion.
rental.drivers_desc: Experienced, licensed, and courteous drivers for a seamless journey.
rental.awards_desc: Recognized for excellence in customer service and vehicle quality.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.description: Real reviews from our valued customers who experienced the Caros difference

items.name: Ahmed Al-Rashid
items.content: Exceptional service and premium vehicles. The car was immaculate and the booking process was seamless. Highly recommended for anyone seeking luxury transportation.

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.content: Amazing experience renting from Caros. The staff was incredibly helpful and the vehicle exceeded my expectations. Will definitely use again for my next visit.

items.name: Mohammed Al-Fayed
items.content: Professional service from start to finish. The vehicle selection is outstanding and the maintenance is top-notch. A truly premium experience.
